About Abuya Modern

Kenya's Most Trusted Bus Company

Abuya Modern Bus has been connecting communities across Kenya since 2014. From Nairobi's bustling streets to the remote beauty of Northern Kenya, we bring safe, comfortable travel to every passenger.

Our fleet of modern Scania coaches is maintained to the highest standards. Every journey is GPS-tracked, every driver professionally trained, and every seat designed for comfort on long-distance routes.

Why Choose Us

Travel with Confidence

Thousands of Kenyans trust Abuya Modern every day.

🛡

Safety First

Every bus is rigorously inspected. Professional, licensed drivers with years of experience on Kenyan roads.

⏰

On-Time Departures

We respect your time. Our buses depart on schedule and our operations team monitors every journey.

💺

Comfortable Seats

Reclining seats, extra legroom and A/C on all coaches. 48 seats per bus with spacious layout.

📱

Easy Booking

Book instantly via WhatsApp. No app downloads needed — just message us and your seat is confirmed.

💳

Affordable Fares

Competitive pricing with no hidden charges. Senior and student discounts available on request.

👔

Luggage Allowance

Generous luggage allowance on all routes. Parcel delivery also available — reliable & affordable.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about travelling with Abuya Modern Bus.

Book directly on this website — select your route, pick your seat, fill in your details and confirm via WhatsApp on 0756 908 988. Booking takes under 60 seconds and you get instant confirmation from our team.
The Nairobi to Moyale bus fare on Abuya Modern Bus is KSh 3,000 per seat. The bus stops at Turbi, Walda, and Sololo along the way. Daily departures from Nairobi Bus Station, Eastleigh.
The Nairobi to Marsabit bus fare on Abuya Modern Bus is KSh 2,500 per seat. The route also covers Logologo and Bubisa. Marsabit to Nairobi return fare is also KSh 2,500.
The Nairobi to Isiolo / Archers Post bus fare on Abuya Modern Bus is KSh 1,500 per seat. This is one of our most popular routes with multiple daily departures.
Yes. Abuya Modern Bus operates daily departures on all 18 routes including Nairobi–Moyale, Nairobi–Marsabit, Nairobi–Isiolo, Mwingi–Nairobi, Nairobi–Bura, Nairobi–Hola and more — 365 days a year.
The Nairobi booking office is at Bus Station, Eastleigh, Nairobi. We also have offices in Isiolo, Marsabit, Moyale, Mwingi and Nanyuki. You can also book via WhatsApp on 0756 908 988 from anywhere.
The Mwingi to Nairobi bus fare on Abuya Modern Bus is KSh 1,200 per seat. Abuya also covers Mwingi to Bangal (KSh 800), Mwingi to Madogo (KSh 800), Mwingi to Bura (KSh 1,400), and Mwingi to Hola (KSh 1,400).
